title: PVP Ranked
body:
**PVP Ranked: Ranked Matchmaking for PVPers**

A ranked platform with skill-based matchmaking that updates your skill rating after every match.

**IMPORTANT: Players are not expected to be in queue outside of betas!  
This mod and many major features are under development.**

You can find more info in our discord at [https://discord.gg/gvXYZvBcke](https://discord.gg/gvXYZvBcke)!

![PVP Ranked Title Screen Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c2418ef85b938760f3fab48e1025560c25ab29_0.webp)

Additional Features:
- Matches you against players near your skill rating and of a similar region, to ensure low ping
- Statistics and player profiles
- Patches gameplay bugs such as common causes of Ghost Totems and Ghost Arrows
- Low-storage, gameplay accurate replays of every fight

Features coming to Ranked:
- Rollback Netcode to improve minecraft's Netcode, effectively lowering ping significantly across the board
- Improved Replay system and publicly viewable replays
- Advanced stat tracking and improvement engine to help you learn and understand your mistakes

Discord: [https://discord.gg/gvXYZvBcke](https://discord.gg/gvXYZvBcke)
  
LOGO by vastlysucks - [fiverr](https://www.fiverr.com/vastly_sucks) - [twitter](https://x.com/vastlyy_sucks) - [itch](https://vastlysucks.itch.io)
